reason: The node invokes Schur's lemma (irreducible implies commutant = C*I) which is contained in the definition 'irreducible_representation' in scope. While this fact is standard, for completeness the node should either declare a dependency on that definition or explicitly cite an external reference (e.g., Takesaki I, Proposition I.9.1). Currently the node has no declared dependencies at all, despite using non-trivial facts from representation theory. Similarly, the identification of irreducible representations of C(X) with point evaluations relies on the Gelfand-Naimark theorem (characters of a commutative unital C*-algebra correspond to points of the maximal ideal space), which should be cited.
